prompt: In the Terraform module at modules/widget, add two inputs: the set of private subnet IDs the widget spans, and an optional endpoint_access configuration (private defaults to true, public defaults to false, plus the CIDRs allowed to reach a public endpoint). Follow the repository's Terraform conventions.

Add an optional CloudWatch log group to the Terraform module at modules/widget: created only when a new logging_enabled variable is true, retaining logs for 30 days, named after var.name. Follow the repository's Terraform conventions.
